reasons: Style guide labeled: Weak signal asks rather than asserts

input.instruction: STYLE GUIDE EXAMPLE (SG-G05): GOOD — should PASS. Weak signal asks rather than asserts

candidate_output.subject: Question: are your data engineering hires keeping up?
candidate_output.body:
Hi Tom,

Two open data engineer roles on your careers page — I cannot tell from the outside whether that means hiring is keeping pace or whether the queue is longer than the postings suggest.

We place managed data and Python engineering teams, three-hour overlap with US time zones, one-month minimum. If the queue is longer than the posts, that is the pattern we solve most often.

If two roles is the actual demand and you are well-staffed to meet it, ignore this. If the real number is higher, a 15-minute conversation costs you nothing.

Worth 15 minutes this week? https://cal.com/yakob/30min

Research Partner
Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com

Best,
Yabi
Research Partner
Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com

forbidden_phrases: i hope this email finds you

metadata.style_guide_label: Weak signal asks rather than asserts
